basic_details.job_title: CUTN Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Guest Faculty Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Central University of Tamil Nadu (CUTN) has officially announced the Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 with 5 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official CUTN website. Candidates holding a Master's degree with 55% marks along with SLET/NET/Ph.D. and relevant industrial experience are eligible to submit their applications via email on or before 27 July 2026. Shortlisted candidates will attend the walk-in interview on 28 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks, SLET/ NET/ Ph.D and Industrial experience
qualification.details: B.Voc in Digital Journalism and Multimedia Applications: A Master's degree with minimum 55% marks in the related field with NET/Ph.D preferably with relevant Industrial/teaching experience. B. Com (Vocational): M.Com with minimum 55% marks and NET/Ph.D and preferably with relevant industrial/teaching experience. B.Voc in Tourism and Hospitality Management: A Master's degree with 55% marks in Tourism/Management with NET/Ph.D. and preferably with relevant industrial/teaching experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 500 per teaching hours subject to a maximum of Rs.25,000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUTN Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUTN Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUTN Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUTN Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CUTN Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty posts at CUTN?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Guest Faculty positions at Central University of Tamil Nadu is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with at least 55% marks in the relevant subject, along with SLET/NET/Ph.D. and relevant industrial experience. Specific qualifications may vary slightly per post.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Guest Faculty at CUTN?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Guest Faculty positions announced by the Central University of Tamil Nadu in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty at CUTN?
faq.answer: The salary is offered at Rs. 500 per teaching hour, with a maximum monthly earning capped at Rs. 25,000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is via email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address provided by CUTN before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Guest Faculty positions at CUTN.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty positions at Central University of Tamil Nadu will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Guest Faculty positions is scheduled to be held on 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty positions at CUTN are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Central University of Tamil Nadu located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Tamil Nadu is located in Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 610005.
